results.rendered_html:
sāṃyugīna a. [saṃyuge sādhuḥ kha] Warlike, skilled in war; bhavāṃśca sāṃyugīnaḥ sahāyo naḥ  V. 5 ;  R. 11. 30. 
— naḥ A great warrior, a soldier skilled in war;  Ku. 2. 57.
